---
title: "Projects"
listing: 
 # all Quarto docs in the `posts` directory will be included on your listing page
  contents: posts
  # or `default` or `table`; each type has its own set of yaml options to include
  type: grid 
  # can also sort on more than one field
  sort: "date desc"
   # allows you to sort posts by assigned categories  
  categories: true
title-block-banner: true
css: styles.scss
---
